metadata.significance: Pure monotheism, equals one-third of Quran in reward when recited

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ

translations.en_yusufali: Say: He is Allah, the One and Only;
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "(Tuhanku) ialah Allah Yang Maha Esa;
"Allah Yang menjadi tumpuan sekalian makhluk untuk memohon sebarang hajat;

translations.en_sahih: He neither begets nor is born,
translations.en_yusufali: He begetteth not, nor is He begotten;
translations.ms_basmeih: "Ia tiada beranak, dan Ia pula tidak diperanakkan;

translations.en_sahih: Nor is there to Him any equivalent."
translations.en_yusufali: And there is none like unto Him.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan tidak ada sesiapapun yang serupa denganNya".
